title: SACRAMENTO – On Tuesday the Assembly Public Safety Committee approved
prompt_preview:
[1 chunks] Task: Extract all distinct claims about AI or emerging technology in this press release. Do NOT assume a fixed number.
Output JSON only matching the provided schema.
Return concise, standalone claim_texts that could be tested against scientific literature. Exclude purely procedural statem

claims.claim_text: Fentanyl is 50 times more potent than heroin.
Fentanyl is 100 times stronger than morphine.
Fentanyl is a major contributor to fatal overdose deaths in the United States.
In 2023 alone, 62,224 pounds of fentanyl were seized in California.
The seizure of fentanyl in California represents a 1066% increase in just 2 years.
